name: Stock Report Generation System
initial_requirements: I need a website that helps me search for stocks and automatically generate stock analysis reports.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer to search for stocks by entering stock codes or stock names.
I prefer to select the report format and content scope before report generation, instead of using a default report template.
I prefer to choose the analysis time range before generating the report.
I prefer to download or export the generated stock report after it is created.
I expect the generated reports to include basic stock information, market trends, and financial data.
I expect the generated report to include charts or tables that summarize key stock indicators.
I prefer the website to use a white background.
I prefer the website components to use a navy color.
I expect stock prices, market trends, and financial data in the report to be based on current data.
I expect the report to show when the stock data was last updated.
I expect the system to warn me when stock data is missing, delayed, or inconsistent.
I expect the system to retrieve stock information from external market data APIs.
I expect the system to use a configurable external market data provider for retrieving stock information.
I expect the system to show the connection status of the external market data provider before generating a report.
I expect stock analysis reports to be generated within an acceptable amount of time after I submit my choices.
I expect the system to remain responsive while generating stock analysis reports.
I expect the system to support multiple users generating stock reports without noticeable slowdown.

URL: As a user, I want to search for stock information by providing stock codes or names, so that I can find data about specific stocks.
As a user, I want the website to automatically generate stock analysis reports for my choosen, so that I can quickly understand key points.
As a user, I want to select report formats and report content, so that I can control the type of report generated.
As a user, I want the generated reports to include basic stock information, so that I can understand fundamental details.
As a user, I want the generated reports to include market trends, so that I can understand how the stock performs in the market.
As a user, I want the generated reports to include financial data, so that I can analyze the stock’s financial performance.
As a user, I want the website background color to be white, so that the interface follows the specified visual requirement.
As a user, I want the website components to use a navy color, so that the interface matches the specified component color.
As a user, I want stock prices, market trends, and financial data in generated reports to be based on current data, so that I can trust the report's analysis.
As a user, I want the generated report to show when the stock data was last updated, so that I can judge the freshness of the analysis.
As a user, I want the system to warn me when stock data is missing, delayed, or inconsistent, so that I do not rely on misleading reports.
As a user, I want the system to retrieve stock information from external market data APIs, so that reports are based on market data sources.
As a user, I want the system to use a configurable external market data provider, so that stock information can be retrieved from an appropriate data source.
As a user, I want to see the connection status of the external market data provider before generating a report, so that I know whether the report can use an available data source.
As a user, I want stock analysis reports to be generated within an acceptable amount of time after I submit my choices, so that I can use the report without long delays.
As a user, I want the system to remain responsive while generating stock analysis reports, so that I can continue using the interface during report generation.
As an administrator, I want the system to support multiple users generating stock reports without noticeable slowdown, so that the service remains usable under normal load.
As a user, I want to choose the analysis time range before generating the report, so that the generated analysis matches the period I care about.
As a user, I want to download or export the generated stock report after it is created, so that I can save or share the analysis.
As a user, I want the generated report to include charts or tables that summarize key stock indicators, so that I can understand the analysis more quickly.

name: Hospital Management and Information System
initial_requirements: I want a website that helps manage hospital operations, including clinical, administrative, and operational activities, and provides a clear overview of the hospital’s overall performance.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer the system to support structured report generation (inventory, patient, and financial reports)
I prefer employees to submit daily activity reports directly through the system so that reporting to superiors is integrated into routine workflows.
I prefer financial interactions, such as collecting patient fees and preparing claims, to be handled within the same system
I prefer users to filter hospital reports by department, date range, and report type.
I expect hospital performance information to be reflected through detailed financial, inventory, patient, and operational reports
I expect patient electronic files to contain structured medical and administrative details, including identification, visit history, diagnoses, and supplementary comments.
I expect pharmacy management to focus on medicine inventory details to ensure accurate tracking of stock levels.
I expect daily employee reports to include detailed descriptions of activities
I expect claim records to include patient information, service details, claim status, and supporting notes.
I expect laboratory management information to include test requests, test results, and related patient details.
I prefer the website to use a peach puff background color.
I prefer the website’s interface components to be displayed in indian red.
I expect patient electronic files to be accessible only to authorized hospital staff.
I expect different hospital roles to have different permissions for patient, financial, inventory, and claim records.
I expect sensitive patient and financial information to be protected from unauthorized access.
I expect changes to patient records, financial records, and claims to be logged for audit purposes.
I expect audit logs to include the user, time, and action performed.
I expect exports of sensitive patient or financial data to be recorded for audit review.
I expect patient, pharmacy, financial, claim, laboratory, and theater information to be synchronized across modules.
I expect claim formulation to exchange relevant data with financial and patient record modules.
I expect laboratory and theater records to be linked to relevant patient electronic files.

URL: As a user, I want a hospital management website that manages hospital finances, reports, inventory, and patient information, so that all key hospital operations are supported in one system.
As a user, I want the website to provide financial management functionality, so that hospital finances can be managed.
As a user, I want the system to allow collecting patient fees, so that patient payments are handled within the financial management functionality.
As a user, I want the website to provide reporting functionality, so that I can access different types of operational reports.
As a user, I want to generate inventory reports, so that I can view information about hospital inventory.
As a user, I want to generate patient reports, so that I can view information about patients.
As a user, I want to generate financial reports, so that I can view information about hospital finances.
As an employee, I want to submit daily reports to my superiors, so that they receive information about my daily activities.
As an employee, I want my daily reports to include detailed information about daily activities, so that my superiors have complete information on what was done.
As a user, I want pharmacy management functionality that includes inventory management of medicines, so that medicine stock is tracked and managed.
As a user, I want patient electronic files to store the patient name, so that the patient can be identified.
As a user, I want patient electronic files to store the date of visit, so that each visit is recorded.
As a user, I want patient electronic files to store the diagnosis, so that the patient’s medical condition is documented.
As a user, I want patient electronic files to store comments, so that additional notes about the patient or visit are recorded.
As a user, I want the website to provide claim formulation functionality, so that claims can be prepared and managed.
As a user, I want the website to provide laboratory management functionality, so that laboratory-related activities can be managed.
As a user, I want the website to provide theater management functionality, so that theater-related activities can be managed.
As a user, I want the website’s background color configured to peach puff, so that the overall background appears in that color.
As a user, I want the website’s components to use indian red, so that interface components appear in that color.
As an administrator, I want patient electronic files to be accessible only to authorized hospital staff, so that sensitive medical information is protected.

As an administrator, I want different hospital roles to have different permissions for patient, financial, inventory, and claim records, so that each staff member can access only appropriate information.
As an administrator, I want sensitive patient and financial information to be protected from unauthorized access, so that confidential hospital data remains secure.
As an administrator, I want changes to patient records, financial records, and claims to be logged, so that hospital activities can be audited.
As an administrator, I want audit logs to include the user, time, and action performed, so that each sensitive operation is traceable.
As an administrator, I want exports of sensitive patient or financial data to be recorded, so that external data sharing can be reviewed.
As an administrator, I want patient, pharmacy, financial, claim, laboratory, and theater information to be synchronized across modules, so that hospital data stays consistent.
As a user, I want claim formulation to exchange relevant data with financial and patient record modules, so that claims can be prepared using consistent hospital information.
As a hospital staff member, I want laboratory and theater records to be linked to relevant patient electronic files, so that clinical and operational information can be reviewed together.
As a user, I want to filter hospital reports by department, date range, and report type, so that I can find the operational information I need.
As a user, I want claim records to include patient information, service details, claim status, and supporting notes, so that claims are complete and reviewable.
As a user, I want laboratory management information to include test requests, test results, and related patient details, so that lab activity can be managed with patient context.

name: Bus and Railway Ticket Booking System
initial_requirements: I want a platform that helps me look up and book bus and train tickets, complete payments, and manage my trips and past bookings in one place.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer to receive booking confirmations automatically via email.
I prefer to receive booking confirmations automatically via SMS.
I prefer to manage my trips through a personal account that requires registration and login.
I prefer to have the option to print tickets in addition to using digital confirmations.
I prefer the platform to support responsive interaction on mobile devices.
I prefer the platform to support responsive interaction on desktop devices.
I prefer to search trips by origin, destination, travel date, and transport type.
I prefer to cancel or modify a booking from my account when allowed.
I prefer to view real-time seat availability before confirming a booking decision.
I prefer to view real-time pricing before confirming a booking decision.
I prefer to access my booking history through my account
I expect trip results to include departure time, arrival time, duration, operator, and route information.
I prefer the platform to use a snow-colored background consistently across all pages.
I prefer the platform’s interface components to use a dim gray color consistently.
I expect my payment information to be protected during ticket purchases.
I expect only logged-in users to access their own booking history.
I expect the system to protect personal trip and account information from unauthorized access.
I expect the selected seat to be temporarily reserved while payment is being processed.
I expect the system to prevent double booking of the same seat.
I expect booking status to remain consistent if payment fails or the network connection is interrupted.
I expect the platform to integrate with payment gateways for ticket purchases.
I expect the platform to integrate with email and SMS services for booking confirmations.
I expect bus and railway ticket availability to be synchronized with the relevant transport operators.

URL: As a user, I want to search bus tickets, so that I can find suitable bus travel options.
As a user, I want to search railway tickets, so that I can find suitable train travel options.
As a user, I want to book bus tickets, so that I can reserve seats for my bus journeys.
As a user, I want to book railway tickets, so that I can reserve seats for my train journeys.
As a user, I want to view real-time seat availability, so that I can see which seats are currently available before booking.
As a user, I want to view real-time prices, so that I know the current cost of tickets before booking.
As a user, I want to make secure payments, so that my payment information is protected when I purchase tickets.
As a user, I want to receive booking confirmations via email, so that I have my ticket details in my email.
As a user, I want to receive booking confirmations via SMS, so that I have my ticket details on my mobile phone.
As a user, I want to register for an account, so that I can create a personal profile on the platform.
As a user, I want to log in to my account, so that I can securely access my personal information and bookings.
As a user, I want to view my booking history, so that I can see details of my past ticket purchases.
As a user, I want ticket printing options, so that I can print my tickets when needed.
As a user, I want the platform to have a responsive design that adapts to mobile devices, so that I can use it comfortably on my phone or tablet.
As a user, I want the platform to have a responsive design that adapts to desktop devices, so that I can use it comfortably on my computer.
As a user, I want all backgrounds configured with snow, so that the visual background appearance is consistently snowy across the platform.
As a user, I want all components configured with dim gray, so that the visual appearance of components is consistently dim gray across the platform.
As a user, I want my payment information to be protected during ticket purchases, so that I can pay securely.
As a user, I want only logged-in users to access their own booking history, so that personal trip records remain private.
As a user, I want the system to protect personal trip and account information from unauthorized access, so that my travel data and account details remain secure.
As a user, I want the selected seat to be temporarily reserved while payment is being processed, so that another user cannot book the same seat during checkout.
As a user, I want the system to prevent double booking of the same seat, so that each ticket is assigned to only one valid booking.
As a user, I want booking status to remain consistent if payment fails or the network connection is interrupted, so that I know whether my booking is valid.
As a user, I want the platform to integrate with payment gateways, so that I can complete ticket purchases through supported payment services.
As a user, I want the platform to integrate with email and SMS services, so that booking confirmations can be delivered automatically.
As a user, I want bus and railway ticket availability to be synchronized with the relevant transport operators, so that the platform shows accurate availability.
As a user, I want to search trips by origin, destination, travel date, and transport type, so that I can find the route I need.
As a user, I want to cancel or modify a booking from my account when allowed, so that I can manage trip changes.
As a user, I want trip results to include departure time, arrival time, duration, operator, and route information, so that I can compare available trips.

name: Adult Vocabulary Learning and Quiz System
initial_requirements: I want a website that helps me steadily learn and practice new vocabulary, stay motivated, and track my learning progress over time.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer to learn vocabulary through interactive activities such as quizzes, games, and puzzles
I prefer structured, recurring learning with a fixed pace of 10 new words each week
I prefer to review and practice vocabulary using multiple activity formats (e.g., flashcards, fill-in-the-blank, word games) to reinforce learning.
I prefer to personalize my learning experience by choosing an avatar.
I prefer to retry incorrect questions after receiving feedback.
I prefer to set reminders or learning sessions to help me maintain a regular study habit.
I prefer to navigate the website through clearly separated pages (home, activity pages, dashboard, blog)
I expect the website to focus on adult-level vocabulary rather than general or child-oriented word lists.
I expect vocabulary practice content to include crossword puzzles, unjumble-letter games, synonym games, antonym games, flashcards, and fill-in-the-blank exercises.
I expect the system to provide a clear progress summary that reflects my ongoing vocabulary learning over time.
I expect supplementary learning content to be available through blog pages related to vocabulary learning.
I expect vocabulary entries to include definitions, example sentences, and usage notes.
I prefer the website’s body background to be light gray.
I prefer the main interface components to use a dark red color.
I expect the system to adjust vocabulary difficulty based on my learning progress.
I expect the system to recommend review activities based on words I struggle with.
I expect the weekly learning pace to be adjustable when my performance suggests it is too easy or too difficult.
I expect the system to show correct answers and brief explanations after I answer incorrectly.
I expect the system to identify vocabulary words that I have mastered and words that still need practice.
I expect progress summaries to include accuracy, practice frequency, and weak vocabulary areas.
I expect AI-generated vocabulary examples and exercises to be screened for inappropriate or harmful content before being shown to learners.
I expect AI-generated learning content to avoid offensive, misleading, or unsafe language usage.
I expect users to be able to report unsafe or inappropriate AI-generated content for review.

URL: As a user, I want to learn adult vocabulary through a website, so that I can improve my vocabulary skills.
As a user, I want the website to include a variety of quizzes and word games, so that my learning experience is engaging.
As a user, I want to play crossword puzzles on the website, so that I can practice vocabulary in a puzzle format.
As a user, I want to play unjumble-letters games on the website, so that I can practice forming correct words from scrambled letters.
As a user, I want to play games for finding synonyms on the website, so that I can learn words with similar meanings.
As a user, I want to play games for finding antonyms on the website, so that I can learn words with opposite meanings.
As a user, I want to use flashcards on the website, so that I can review and memorize vocabulary.
As a user, I want to do fill-in-the-blank activities on the website, so that I can practice using words in context.
As a user, I want a dashboard that displays a progress summary, so that I can see how I am progressing in my vocabulary learning.
As a user, I want the system to teach me a set of 10 new words every week, so that my vocabulary grows at a steady weekly pace.
As a user, I want to be able to choose an avatar, so that I can personalize my presence on the website.
As a user, I want to play a simple game while waiting in the waiting room, so that I am engaged during waiting periods.
As a user, I want the website to include a home page, so that I have a starting point for accessing the site’s features.
As a user, I want the website to include 5 activity pages, so that I can access different vocabulary activities separately.
As a user, I want the website to include a dashboard page, so that I can view my progress summary in a dedicated area.
As a user, I want the website to include blog pages, so that I can access additional content related to vocabulary learning.
As a user, I want the body backgrounds of the website to be light gray, so that the overall page background has the specified color.
As a user, I want the main components of the website to be dark red, so that the primary interface elements have the specified color.
As a learner, I want the system to adjust vocabulary difficulty based on my learning progress, so that I can keep learning at an appropriate level.
As a learner, I want the system to recommend review activities based on words I struggle with, so that I can focus on weak vocabulary areas.
As a learner, I want the weekly learning pace to be adjustable when my performance suggests it is too easy or too difficult, so that the learning plan fits my ability.
As a learner, I want the system to show correct answers and brief explanations after I answer incorrectly, so that I can understand my mistakes.
As a learner, I want the system to identify vocabulary words that I have mastered and words that still need practice, so that I know what to review.
As a learner, I want progress summaries to include accuracy, practice frequency, and weak vocabulary areas, so that I can understand my learning status.
As a learner, I want AI-generated vocabulary examples and exercises to be screened for inappropriate or harmful content, so that the learning environment remains safe.
As a learner, I want AI-generated learning content to avoid offensive, misleading, or unsafe language usage, so that I can trust the material I practice with.
As a learner, I want to report unsafe or inappropriate AI-generated content for review, so that problematic material can be corrected.
As a learner, I want to retry incorrect questions after receiving feedback, so that I can reinforce vocabulary I missed.
As a learner, I want to set reminders or learning sessions, so that I can maintain a regular study habit.
As a learner, I want vocabulary entries to include definitions, example sentences, and usage notes, so that I can understand how each word is used.

name: 訂餐外送系統
initial_requirements: 我想要一個線上訂餐外送平台，讓顧客可以搜尋餐廳、瀏覽菜單、加入購物車、下單付款並追蹤外送，同時讓餐廳管理菜單與訂單、外送員接收派單並完成配送、平台管理者查看營運狀態。

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: 我偏好可以依地點、關鍵字、餐點類別、評分、外送時間與價格篩選餐廳。
我偏好在結帳前可以確認並修改購物車中的餐點、數量、備註、配送方式、地址與金額明細。
我偏好餐廳與外送員能透過明確的按鈕接單、拒單，並更新備餐或配送進度。
我期望餐廳列表能顯示評分、營業時間、外送時段、外送門檻與預估外送時間。
我期望訂單明細包含餐點項目、數量、備註、金額明細、付款狀態、配送地址與訂單狀態。
我期望營運報表包含交易量、熱門餐點、使用者留存、營收、訂單數據與外送效率等資訊。
我偏好平台整體背景使用白色或淺色系。
我偏好主要操作元件使用橘色或暖色系，以符合餐飲外送平台的視覺風格。
我期望下單、付款和查詢操作能快速完成，不會讓顧客在流程中等待太久。
我期望用餐尖峰時段仍能順利完成搜尋、下單與付款，不會因流量變大而明顯變慢。
我期望外送員位置更新足夠即時，讓顧客能大致掌握外送進度與預估到達時間。
我期望主要用餐時段平台的下單、付款與追蹤功能能穩定可用。
我期望系統發生故障後能盡快恢復，而且既有訂單與付款紀錄不會遺失。
我期望餐廳接單設備出問題時，訂單不會卡住，而是能被轉到備援設備或營運後台處理。
我期望付款資料與個人資料在平台上受到安全保護。
我期望顧客與外送員的電話等聯絡資訊不會直接互相暴露。
我期望退款、帳號修改與權限變更這類高風險操作只有授權人員能執行。
我期望訂單的重要狀態能透過應用程式推播、簡訊或電子郵件通知相關使用者。
我期望外送導航與顧客追蹤能連接地圖與定位服務。

URL: 作為顧客，我想要依地點、關鍵字、餐點類別、評分、外送時間與價格篩選餐廳，以便快速找到符合需求的餐廳。
作為顧客，我想要在結帳前確認並修改餐點、數量、備註、配送方式、地址與金額明細，以便避免送出錯誤訂單。
作為餐廳或外送員，我想要透過明確的按鈕接單、拒單並更新進度，以便讓訂單狀態即時反映給相關使用者。
作為顧客，我想要餐廳列表顯示評分、營業時間、外送時段、外送門檻與預估外送時間，以便比較不同餐廳。
作為顧客，我想要訂單明細顯示餐點、數量、備註、金額、付款、地址與狀態，以便確認訂單內容。
作為平台管理者，我想要查看交易量、熱門餐點、使用者留存、營收、訂單數據與外送效率，以便掌握平台營運狀況。
作為顧客，我想要平台整體背景使用白色或淺色系，以便訂餐流程的畫面保持清爽。
作為顧客，我想要主要操作元件使用橘色或暖色系，以便介面呈現餐飲外送平台的視覺風格。
作為顧客，我想要下單、付款和查詢操作快速完成，以便不會在訂餐流程中等待太久。
作為顧客，我想要用餐尖峰時段仍能順利搜尋、下單與付款，以便流量變大時也能完成訂餐。
作為顧客，我想要外送員位置更新足夠即時，以便掌握外送進度與預估到達時間。
作為平台營運方，我想要主要用餐時段的下單、付款與追蹤功能穩定可用，以便維持服務連續性。
作為平台營運方，我想要系統故障後能盡快恢復且保留既有訂單與付款紀錄，以便降低業務中斷風險。
作為餐廳，我想要接單設備故障時訂單能轉到備援設備或營運後台，以便訂單不會卡住。
作為顧客，我想要付款資料與個人資料受到安全保護，以便安心使用平台付款與訂餐。
作為顧客或外送員，我想要聯絡電話不會直接互相暴露，以便保護個人聯絡資料。
作為平台管理者，我想要退款、帳號修改與權限變更只有授權人員能執行，以便降低高風險操作被濫用的可能。
作為顧客，我想要平台支援常見付款服務並正確更新付款結果，以便付款後訂單狀態能即時反映。
作為顧客、餐廳或外送員，我想要訂單重要狀態透過應用程式推播、簡訊或電子郵件通知，以便即時掌握訂單變化。
作為外送員與顧客，我想要外送導航與訂單追蹤連接地圖與定位服務，以便支援送餐導航與配送進度追蹤。
